name: Infra: Agent Activity Dashboard → GitHub Pages

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  COALESCE(role, 'unknown') AS role,
  COALESCE(action, '') AS action,
  COALESCE(status, 'unknown') AS status,
  COALESCE(details, '') AS details,
  COALESCE(channel, '') AS channel,
  CAST(ts AS STRING) AS ts
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.agent_activity_log`
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  COALESCE(gid, '') AS gid,
  COALESCE(title, '') AS title,
  COALESCE(assignee_name, '') AS assignee_name,
  CAST(due_on AS STRING) AS due_on
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.asana_task_status`
WHERE completed = FALSE
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(title, '')) NOT LIKE '%direct log%'
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(title, '')) NOT LIKE '%connection test%'
  AND LOWER(COALESCE(title, '')) NOT LIKE '%test connection%'
ORDER BY due_on ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

SELECT
  COALESCE(channel, 'unknown') AS channel,
  COALESCE(status, 'unknown') AS status,
  SUM(COALESCE(checks_passed, 0)) AS checks_passed,
  SUM(COALESCE(checks_failed, 0)) AS checks_failed,
  CAST(MAX(check_ts) AS STRING) AS last_seen
FROM `{{ $vars.BQ_PROJECT }}.{{ $vars.BQ_DATASET }}.connector_health_log`
WHERE check_ts >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
GROUP BY channel, status
ORDER BY channel

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'chore(pages): update activity dashboard ' + new Date().toISOString().substring(0,16), content: $('Build HTML').first().json.base64, sha: ($('GitHub - Get SHA').first().json.sha || undefined) }) }}
